title: delissea grimesiana
intro: Delissea grimesiana, also known as the Hawaiian heath, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. It is native to the Hawaiian Islands and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Delissea grimesiana include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical treatments.
